ddls:
CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website URL */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department (e.g., Men, Women, Kids) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season (e.g., Spring, Summer, Fall, Winter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the size chart belongs to */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand the size chart belongs to */,
  "size_chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the size chart */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size chart */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender (e.g., Unisex, Men, Women) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group (e.g., Adult, Child) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the size chart was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the size chart was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_ranges" (
  "size_range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size range */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart the size range belongs to */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size range (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size range */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Fit type (e.g., Regular, Slim, Loose) */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_range_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_ranges_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "size_range_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size range the measurement belongs to */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement (e.g., bust, waist, hip) */,
  "measurement_value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_range_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_range_id") REFERENCES size_ranges ("size_range_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand the product belongs to */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart associated with the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the size belongs to */,
  "size_range_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size range the size belongs to */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the specific size in stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_range_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_range_id") REFERENCES size_ranges ("size_range_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Customer's phone number */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Customer's date of birth */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "customer_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer measurement */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the measurement belongs to */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement (e.g., bust, waist, hip) */,
  "measurement_value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Order status (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order was placed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_size_id") REFERENCES product_sizes ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_chart_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the template */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the template belongs to */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand the template belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the template */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the template was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the template was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_templates_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_templates_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_chart_template_items" (
  "template_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each template item */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the template */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement (e.g., bust, waist, hip) */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_template_items_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES size_chart_templates ("template_id")
)
